Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 40 

NRSNG_CSTDL_CARE_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Nursing Custodial Care Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the nursing custodial care facility provider 
category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: NRSNG_CSTDL_CARE_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: NRSNG_CSTDL_CARE_PRVDR_TXNMY_IND
